description: A high-power rocket is being upgraded with a massive K-class motor, pushing it into the transonic/supersonic regime. Open the base rocket design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/flutter_base.ork. Configure the rocket for an 'Aerotech K550W' motor. Modify the Trapezoidal fin set to use Carbon fiber or Fiberglass with a thickness of at least 5.0 mm. Add at least 0.3 kg of mass to the Nose cone to achieve a stability margin of at least 1.5. Ensure the final configuration passes flight simulation without warnings. Save the design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/supersonic_upgrade.ork and export an engineering report documenting the motor, fin material/thickness, nose ballast, and final stability margin to /home/ga/Documents/exports/flutter_report.txt.
